message: "Yuki!"

name: Yuki
message: "Hm?"

name: Yuki
message: "Oh, the little Wakatsuki sister."
"What do you mean, 'little'?!"

name: Yuki
message: "Your height?"
"I'm not that short. Jeez."
Wakatsuki Tsukasa. My neighbor and childhood friend.
We're close in age, and her house is next to mine.

name: Tsukasa
message: "What a coincidence, running into each other in Suginomiya.
Oh, yeah. You have a part-time job around here, right?"

name: Yuki
message: "Oh, right. Maybe that was in my character bio."
"What are you talking about? What's a character bio got to do with your job?"

name: Yuki
message: "Oh, you're..."
"And? From that attitude, I take it you're skipping work?"

name: Yuki
message: "Who are you again?"
"Who am I?
You know who I am! Like you'd forget!"

name: Yuki
message: "What? Quit acting like you're famous with the whole 'Of course you should know my name!' thing. It's not a good look."
"Acting like I'm famous doesn't have anything to do with it! Why do you remember Tsukasa's name but not mine?!"

name: Yuki
message: "It might have something to do with it."

name: Tsukasa
message: "You shouldn't do that, Yuki. We've always been together since kindergarten. There's no way you'd forget who she is."

name: Yuki
message: "Really? Has it been that long already?"

name: Tsukasa
message: "So, Yuki, what about your job?"

name: Yuki
message: "Unfortunately, it's been suspended due to grown-up reasons."

name: Tsukasa
message: "Grown-up reasons?"
"Like hell it has.
Ugh, I'm done! Tsukasa, I'm leaving. If I stay here and spend any more time talking to her, I'll get infected with her idiocy."

name: Tsukasa
message: "Ahahaha. Being stupid isn't an infectious disease, Onee-chan."

name: Yuki
message: "Now I get it. So you caught it from Tsu―"

name: Yuki
message: "Ow!"
"I'll hit you if you say anything bad about Tsukasa."

name: Tsukasa
message: "Onee-chan."

name: Yuki
message: "You should give me that warning before you hit me..."
"A ballet starts with the first move."

name: Yuki
message: "Ballet has nothing to do with this! Besides, you've never taken ballet!"
"So you know that, but you still don't remember my name?"

name: Yuki
message: "So, uh... What's the Wakatsuki gang doing here?"
"This 'gang' is on its way back from school, unlike you!"
"See ya!"

name: Yuki
message: "Kagami's as grumpy as ever."

name: Tsukasa
message: "So you knew her name all along. You're so mean."

name: Yuki
message: "Well, I am a tsundere."

name: Tsukasa
message: "Being a tsundere isn't an excuse for bullying someone like that."

name: Yuki
message: "Really?"

name: Tsukasa
message: "Yeah. I'm not sure, but you probably shouldn't do that."

name: Yuki
message: "Kagami's always angry, though."

name: Tsukasa
message: "That's not true. She's a nice person."

name: Yuki
message: "Huh? She's always mad when I see her."

name: Tsukasa
message: "No, you make her mad."

name: Yuki
message: "It's not like I said anything to tick her off."

name: Tsukasa
message: "Ahaha. Yuki, if you really think that, then you should remember that the road to hell is paved with good intentions..."

name: Yuki
message: "Ahaha, I know that. You're talking about yourself, right? You're very critical of yourself, aren't you?"

name: Tsukasa
message: "Ahaha. Yuki!"
Stomp!

name: Yuki
message: "Ahaha... Um, Tsukasa..."

name: Tsukasa
message: "Hm?"

name: Yuki
message: "You'll crush my foot if you keep pressing that hard."

name: Tsukasa
message: "Oh, sorry!
I didn't realize."
Didn't notice, my ass.
They're definitely sisters, even if their personalities are polar opposites.

name: Tsukasa
message: "Are you thinking something mean, Yuki?"

name: Yuki
message: "Huh? N-No, of course not. Ahaha."

name: Tsukasa
message: "Haa... Okay, but you know... Yuki, you've always been Onee-chan's role model."

name: Yuki
message: "Role model?"

name: Tsukasa
message: "So it wouldn't hurt you to be nice to her once in a while."

name: Yuki
message: "Be nice to her, you say?"
I knew full well what Tsukasa was trying to say, but honestly...

name: Kagami
message: "Come on, Tsukasa! We're going home!"

name: Tsukasa
message: "O-Okay! Later, Yuki."
Tsukasa ran after Kagami, trying to catch up to her.
The sight of Tsukasa chasing after someone like that...
For some reason, it felt nostalgic.
Why is that?

name: Yuki
message: "Maybe it's because in the past, Tsukasa always chased after Kagami like that."
To be honest, I couldn't remember that ever happening, and yet it felt so nostalgic.

name: Yuki
message: "Now then."

name: Yuki
message: "Oh, yeah. I came all the way out here to buy my favorite band's new album."
I made my way toward the residential district, leaving behind the hustle and bustle of the station square.
What we call "specialty stores" are generally located in places outside the main shopping district.
I made the trip to Suginomiya just to visit one of those specialty stores that sells CDs.
However...

name: Yuki
message: "Huh? Did I take a wrong turn?"
I'm not sure what happened, but somehow I ended up walking through a place I wasn't familiar with.
Huh? I thought I knew the way pretty well.

name: Yuki
message: "The CD store should've been over this way. I don't know this place."
Maybe I went down the wrong alley?

name: Yuki
message: "Hm? What was that?"
I think I heard a scream just now... Is that what I just heard?
All of a sudden, something fell on my head from above.
I felt something like gravel in my hair when I reached up and touched it.

name: Yuki
message: "Huh? Gravel? From above?"
I looked up and saw something on the roof of the apartment complex.

name: Yuki
message: "Is that a person? Huh? What?!"

What is that...?
&
What are they doing up there?!

name: Yuki
message: "There are people fighting up there!"

name: Yuki
message: "You've gotta be kidding me. They're on the wrong side of the fence!"
They were about to fall. They were on the wrong side of the fence, struggling and fighting on the precipice.

name: Yuki
message: "What the hell are they doing?!"
I had no idea what was going on. The setting sun obscured their features, but I thought I saw my school's uniform.

name: Yuki
message: "Damn!"
I ran inside the apartment building.
I had no idea what they were doing, but I had to stop them.
I smashed the button, but there was no sign of the elevator.

name: Yuki
message: "What's taking so long?!"
Were there stairs outside?
I hurried back out.

And what I saw...
&
Was hard to believe.
One of the silhouettes that had been struggling on the roof now danced through the air.

Falling.
&
Someone was falling from the rooftop.
My mind was completely blank as I ran.

Wait, what exactly was I trying to do?
&
Am I going to catch them?

Catch a person falling from so high?
&
No, that's definitely impossible.
But I'm pretty strong.

No, that has nothing to do with it.
&
I'd definitely die too if I tried to catch them.
Cold logic stopped every one of my rationalizations in its track.
Why was I analyzing this so much, anyway?
Actually...
For some reason, it felt like that person who I thought was plummeting to their death was actually falling rather slowly.
That was probably from the rush of adrenaline that people get in life or death situations.
Is there a light at the end of the tunnel?

name: Yuki
message: "Oooaahhhhh!"
It sounded like something had been crushed. A sound louder than if a tornado had just ripped the roof off someone's house reverberated through the air.
I heard a sound so loud that it convinced me the concrete under my feet surely must've cracked in two.
Or so I thought.
No, I'm pretty sure that's what I heard.
"Boing."
Boing?

name: Yuki
message: "Oh?"
Something crashed into my head with a boing.
Afterward, it slid off and fell gently to the ground.

name: Yuki
message: "Oh?"
What just happened?
What's with the boing?
I picked up the fallen object.

name: Yuki
message: "A stuffed doll..."
What's with this guy? Don't look at me like that. You're just a doll.
Is it doing that tsundere routine?
I-It's not like I was looking for you! I was just passing through, that's all!
That sort of thing?
If so, this would be my response.

name: Yuki
message: "I was about to put my life on the line for you! At least show me some gratitude!"
I looked back up, and...
Boing.

name: Yuki
message: "Whoa!"
Even though it didn't hurt, I couldn't help screaming when something hit my face.

name: Yuki
message: "What is it this time?"
I picked up the thing that fell on my face.

name: Yuki
message: "This is starting to get a little creepy."
I rushed over here to save them, prepared to die.
Yet these dolls just looked at me blankly, like they were saying, "I just felt like falling. Got a problem with that?"
Mmmm...

name: Yuki
message: "What the hell? Why are there dolls falling from the sky?"
There aren't many reasons for it to start raining stuffed dolls.
Maybe some girl with a levitation stone?
Though if it was Lum-chan... Well, nowadays it would be more like Hani Hani. No, that's pretty old too.
Nowadays it would be that SoraOto series, right? No, that'll be outdated soon too. Then how should I describe it?

name: Yuki
message: "No, that's not the issue here."
I looked up again.

name: Yuki
message: "I see."
There was a black silhouette moving around on the edge of the building's roof.

name: Yuki
message: "What are they doing?"
As the black silhouette looked down from the roof, it noticed me and flinched in surprise.

name: Yuki
message: "I take it this was a prank."
For the time being, I held the stuffed dolls over my head as if to say, "You dropped these."
The silhouette kept staring down at me.
Then the figure appeared to take a step forward.
Without thinking, I...

name: Yuki
message: "Aahh!"
For some reason, I yelled and waved her back.
My yelling stopped...
And an awkward silence reigned. It was as if the world stood still for a moment.
The silhouette slipped out of sight back onto the rooftop.

name: Yuki
message: "Haa... So it wasn't suicide after all."
I was a little shocked. For a second, I really thought that someone jumped off the building.
Man, what a pain in the ass.
I went up the stairs to give her the stuffed dolls back. I also wanted to give her an earful while I was at it.
Framed by the evening sunlight, her silhouette was truly beautiful.
Her long hair slowly swayed in the gentle breeze blowing over the rooftop. She looked as if she had lost any connection to our earthly plane.
"I'm sorry."
I was going to complain, but the first thing out of her mouth was an apology.
She killed my momentum from the get-go. I was really going to let her have it, too.

name: Yuki
message: "Instead of apologizing after the fact, maybe you shouldn't have pulled a prank like that in the first place."
"Prank?"
It seemed like she disagreed with my choice of words.

name: Yuki
message: "Huh? That wasn't a prank?"
"No, but I seem to have gotten you involved in this. I'm sorry."

name: Yuki
message: "Involved?"
"You're Minakami Yuki-san, right?"

name: Yuki
message: "Ah, yeah. So you are a Kita High student, like I thought."
That was definitely the Kita High uniform she was wearing.

name: Yuki
message: "Who are you?"

name: "I'm Takashima Zakuro, from the class next to yours."
message: Zakuro
"I'm Takashima Zakuro,

name: Zakuro
message: from the class next to yours."

name: Yuki
message: "From the class next to mine?"
Come to think of it, there might've been a girl like that.
As a general rule, I don't even remember the names of the girls in my own class, let alone the class next to mine.

name: Zakuro
message: "Ahaha.
So you don't remember me?"

name: Yuki
message: "Ahaha. Sorry."

name: Zakuro
message: "Well... For some reason,
I kind of knew you didn't."

name: Yuki
message: "You kind of knew that?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Oh.
No, I'm sorry. When my stuffed doll fell and hit you, I kind of had that feeling."
Um... So, to summarize...
As soon as the stuffed doll crashed into me, this girl realized that I didn't actually know her.
Or something like that.
Uh-huh.
I don't understand anything!
What's up with her? Is she the so-called "mysterious girl" type?

name: Zakuro
message: "Hehe. I'm sorry. It looks like I've confused you."
You got that right.
For the moment, I just held out the two dolls I'd picked up.

name: Zakuro
message: "It looks like they weren't accepted."

name: Yuki
message: "Accepted?"

name: Zakuro
message: "I thought they would be accepted, but it seems that was not to be."

name: Zakuro
message: "And on top of that, I dragged you into this. What a horrible outcome."
No, to tell you the truth, the outcome was fine. Your explanation, on the other hand, was horrible, if you want my honest impression.

name: Yuki
message: "So what, then? If it wasn't a prank, then was it some kind of charm?"
She was talking about things like acceptance, so maybe it was a fairy tale or something.
Maybe there was a story that if you drop a stuffed doll off a building in the evening, your wish would be granted?

name: Zakuro
message: "Charm? Ahahaha, that's right. That's exactly what it is."

name: Yuki
message: "Oh, I see. Is it a love charm?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Huh?"
For some reason, her face reddened.
Why did she blush?

name: Zakuro
message: "Um, Minakami-san, why were you waving your arms earlier?"

name: Yuki
message: "Huh?"

name: Zakuro
message: "When I looked down from the rooftop, you waved, right?"

name: Yuki
message: "Ah, well, I just thought maybe you were looking for your stuffed doll. And I was a little scared that you might jump off."

name: Zakuro
message: "Jump off..."

name: Yuki
message: "Well, how should I put this? I'm sure I was just imagining things, but it looked like the wind was about to blow you off."

name: Zakuro
message: "So you were spreading your arms like 'Don't jump!' or 'Don't come down!'?"

name: Yuki
message: "Well, maybe. It was mostly out of instinct."

name: Zakuro
message: "Instinct, was it?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Hehe."

name: Zakuro
message: "Heh... Hahaha... Hahahahahahaha."

name: Yuki
message: "Huh?"

name: Zakuro
message: "I'm sorry. For some reason, there's this air that keeps coming out of my lungs!"

name: Yuki
message: "Air rushing out of your lungs, huh? We usually call that laughter."

name: Zakuro
message: "Hahahaha. That's right. For some reason, I couldn't stop laughing. I'm sorry."
There were tears coming out of the corners of her eyes, as if she thought it was funny that someone would instinctively try to save her.

name: Zakuro
message: "Oh, right."

name: Yuki
message: "Hmm? What?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Ah, nothing. Just sending a text message."

name: Yuki
message: "A text message?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Yes. A commemorative text."

name: Yuki
message: "A commemorative text... Who are you sending it to?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Let's see. Well, I have 158 people in my phone, so 158 people."

name: Yuki
message: "What kind of message?"

name: Zakuro
message: "No, uh...
Please don't look. You'd be pretty put off."

name: Yuki
message: "Put off?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Oh, it's just that
I thought I'd play the first and last prank."

name: Yuki
message: "The first and last prank?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Yes. The first and last prank."

name: Zakuro
message: "I thought it might be okay to play a prank like that."

name: Yuki
message: "Right..."
Zakuro's smile looked kind of scary when she said that.
She looked a bit ghastly.
She reminded me of a witch laying a curse.

name: Zakuro
message: "July 12th, 2012. 10:44 PM. Oh, is that the time?"

name: Zakuro
message: "But it's still evening here."
